channel.title: summarizedStoriesHealthOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesHealthOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Two startlingly different views on long-awaited data on America's anti-HIV efforts
item.description: After a year without data, the State Department released figures on PEPFAR, the program launched by George W. Bush and credited with saving millions o...

item.title: Sycophantic AI flatters and suggests you are not to blame
item.description: The AI models and chatbots that we interact with tend to affirm our feelings and viewpoints — more so than people do, with potentially worrisome conse...

item.title: Food Stamp Work Rules Don’t Increase Employment, Researchers Say
item.description: Work requirements will encourage people who are able to work to seek and maintain jobs, proponents say. But researchers haven’t found that they lower ...

item.title: Food Stamp Work Rules Don’t Increase Employment, Researchers Say
item.description: Work requirements will encourage people who are able to work to seek and maintain jobs, proponents say. But researchers haven’t found that they lower ...

item.title: Medigap Premiums Leap, and Consumers Have Few Alternatives
item.description: Millions of people rely on the supplemental insurance to offset the deductibles, copayments, and other costs faced by enrollees in the traditional Med...

item.title: Medigap Premiums Leap, and Consumers Have Few Alternatives

item.title: Restrictions on obesity drug coverage force patients to pivot
item.description: Twelve million people lost coverage for Zepbound over the last year. The same number of people lost coverage for Wegovy, according to an analysis by G...

item.title: Gene therapy for a rare type of deafness shows lasting results
item.description: Researchers say a gene therapy allowed deaf children and adults as old as 32 to hear for the first time. The benefits have persisted for more than two...

item.title: Trump administration delays rule aimed at improving disability access in schools
item.description: Schools, colleges and other public institutions originally had until this week to make online content accessible to people with disabilities. Now, the...

item.title: Dayne Williams, Quantum Health
item.description: Quantum Health is one of the biggest and original navigation companies. Dayne Williams came out of retirement to take over as CEO after Zane Burke ret...

item.title: Philippe Pouletty, Carvolix
item.description: Philippe Pouletty is a physician who’s an inventor, French venture capitalist, and the founder of Carvolix. Carvolix is a medical technology company t...

item.title: Peter Stetson, TigerConnect
item.description: Peter Stetson is the CMIO of TigerConnect. It’s now calling itself an AI platform to connect people, especially workflows between doctors, nurses, EMT...

item.title: A Unified Sense of Self
item.description: By MIKE MAGEE Stanford neuroscientist, David Eagleman, reminded us this week that “A coherent explanation of consciousness eludes modern science.” Tha...

item.title: Concierge Care for All: Yes, It Really Is That Simple
item.description: By MATTHEW HOLT & CLAUDE You’ll recall that a few weeks back I gave Claude some prompts and my entire corpus of work on THCB and asked it to write a p...
